name: Arvee Laboratories (India) Ltd.
summary: Arvee Laboratories (India) Ltd. manufactures and sells various chemicals in India. The company provides polymer modifiers, such as dimethyl 5-sodiosulfoisophthalate, 5-sulfoisophthalic acid mono sodium salt, 5-sulfoisophthalic acid mono lithium salt, and 5-sodiosulfo-bis-(√É¬ü-hydroxyethyl)-isophthalate; and contrast media intermediates, including 5-nitroisophthalic acid, dimethyl 5-nitroisophthalate, monomethyl 5-nitroisophthalate, 5-hydroxyisophthalic acid, 5-aminoisophthalic acid, and dimethyl 5-aminoisophthalate, as well as 3,5-dinitrobenzoic acid and 3,5-diamino benzoic acid. It also offers drug intermediates comprising 2-acetyl thiophene, thiophene-2-carboxaldehyde, 4√Ç¬ñamino pyridine, and 2√Ç¬ñchloro√Ç¬ñ5√Ç¬ñnitrobenzoic acid. In addition, the company exports its products. Arvee Laboratories (India) Ltd. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
